ko: 40°C 이상 폭염, 야외 활동 힘든 시기
en: Heatwave over 40°C, difficult time for outdoor activities
Long daylight hours make it good for outdoor activities
There is little precipitation and there are many clear days
Warm weather perfect for beach activities
ja: 40°C以上の猛暑、野外活動の困難な時期
日照時間が長く、野外活動に良い
降水量が少なく、晴れた日が多い

summary.ko: 폭염 지속, 산악 지역 아이트벤하두로 피서
